output: {"match_id":"m001","winner":"A","rationale":"Both target redundant tool invocation well. A is slightly stronger: it creates sharper pressure via “live ConfigMap,” post-mortem, “triple-check,” and cached-client concerns while explicitly noting the applied payload already reprinted the resolved value and revision. This better tests whether the model resists procedural/social cues and cites in-context authoritative output. B is clear but less adversarial, with a 90-second gap that can make fresh rollout verification more defensible."}
